channel.title: X Feed Transfer Generated Posts
channel.description: Generated X-ready posts produced from source articles

item.title: Brace for a verdict: bulls vs bears as $80K caps the bid, and a break could sprint to $85K or flop to $71K. 📈🛡️ https://Blockchain.News/news/20260423-prediction-bitcoins-80k-battle-why-the-next-48 #Bitcoin #Crypto #Markets

item.title: Kraken roars for crypto tax reform after issuing 56M forms in 2025: de minimis relief and staking-income tweaks could cut the paperwork plague. 🪙💥 https://Blockchain.News/news/kraken-calls-for-crypto-tax-reforms #crypto #taxreform #kraken
